description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is finished in a smooth, metallic or glass material and displays a prominent silver Apple logo at its center. Two camera lenses and a flash are arranged in the top left corner of the back, slightly raised in a square module. The sides are thin and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large display, dual rear cameras, and a metallic or glass back featuring a central Apple logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful gradient wallpaper and a notch at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slimness and the slight protrusion of the rear camera module.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the silver Apple logo, dual camera setup in the top left, and a smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and the camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly visible against the smooth surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful gradient wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are located in the top left corner on the back, arranged diagonally within a raised square module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides: two volume buttons and a mute switch on the left edge, and a power button on the right edge.
